blockers: RNA FASTQs were not downloaded and no transcript-level truth target is selected.
next_action: Transfer HG008 RNA FASTQs and run quantification against a selected RNA QC target.
no_call_policy: No-call for biological expression truth until FASTQs are quantified against a selected RNA target.

public_finding: Seraseq ctDNA MRD 0 percent tumor component should be negative
